summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rechev IL Israeli vehicle lookup app. Backend APIs working well (93% success), frontend core functionality excellent with proper RTL Hebrew support. Main issue: frontend auth cookie handling needs investigation.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Takes 5+ seconds to respond, occasionally times out
flaky_endpoints.impact: Slow user experience on full vehicle check

integration_issues.issue: Auth-gated pages still redirect to login even with valid session token cookie
Sometimes shows skeleton loading state longer than expected

passed_tests: Homepage loads with search input, camera, gallery buttons
Vehicle search works (1234567 → Alfa Romeo 159 data)
Vehicle page shows license plate, status cards, basic/pro details
Login page renders with Google login button
Pricing page renders with Free/Pro cards, FAQ accordion
Auth-gated pages redirect to /login when not authenticated
Search validation with Hebrew error messages
Pro feature upgrade buttons redirect to pricing
Backend vehicle APIs (search, theft, disability, stats)
Backend auth APIs with Bearer token authentication
Backend protected APIs return 401 without auth
MongoDB test user and session creation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor auth cookie issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication cookie handling - auth-gated pages (history, favorites, account) should work with valid session tokens. Currently they redirect to login even with valid cookies. Backend auth works correctly with Bearer tokens.
